title: Can I add a description for a board through Integrations/Webhooks?
excerpt: Can I add a description for a board through Integrations/Webhooks??

posts.author: Stromasys (Ciora)
posts.cookedHtml: Can I add a description for a board through Integrations/Webhooks??

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @Stromasys

Welcome to the community! Sure you can update the boards description. Try this one:

mutation updateBoardDescription ($boardId: Int!, $description: String!) {
        update_board (board_id: $boardId, board_attribute: description, new_value: $description) 
      }

posts.author: Stromasys (Ciora)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @basdebruin
How can I use the above mutation for integration to Salesforce??

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @Stromasys
I guess the party that developed the Salesforce integration has to add this to their code.
